title: paraphaius flavus
intro: Paraphaius flavus, also known as the Golden Balm, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and square stems. The medicinal properties of Paraphaius flavus lie in its essential oil, which contains antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Paraphaius flavus can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, where its extract is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
